case_title: PERICH, WALTER VS CHEUNG, ALLAN K. INDIVIDUALLY et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PERICH, WALTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEUNG, ALLAN K. INDIVIDUALLY AZIZIAN, HASSAN IND/DBA CALIFORNAI AUTO SERV CTR. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,020.00, DEFENDANT CHEUNG, ALLAN DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT AZIZIAN STATED THAT HE IS THE SOLE OWNER OF BUSINESS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CHEUNG, ALLAN K. INDIVIDUALLY AZIZIAN, HASSAN IND/DBA CALIFORNAI AUTO SERV CTR.
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT AZIZIAN, HASSAN IND/DBA CALIFORNAI AUTO SERV CTR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PERICH, WALTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEUNG, ALLAN K. INDIVIDUALLY AZIZIAN, HASSAN IND/DBA CALIFORNAI AUTO SERV CTR. $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,000.00, DAMAGES ARE $5000 BUT PLAINTIFF WAS 20% COMPAR- ATIVELY NEGLIGENT IN NOT CHECKING HIS OIL LEVEL DURING LENGTHY TIME PERIOD. JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 27106 ON 1/29/03 NO EXHIBIT RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
